title: Haunted Encounters v.1 [Fabric/NeoForge 1.21.1]
description: Spooky Ghosts from the Pokemon Tower invade your world, bringing a whole new otherwordly challenge!
body:
# Minecraft nights are always dangerous, with hostiles lurking everywhere.

**On a night of a full moon, you peek outside. Weird, the surrounding area seems to be devoid of any life, but you see something float in the distance. _It suddenly turns to stare at you with glowing eyes, sending shivers down your spine!_**




![Ghosts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aded41f4c7a85ea1b605464f265741af05ec9ac2.png)

Bringing spooky back, **Haunted Encounters** adds naturally spawning, new Ghost mobs inspired from the Pokemon Tower Ghosts from the Kanto Region. These lost souls serve as an alternative to vanilla hostile mobs, making your Cobblemon experience much more immersive **(and terrifying).**

![Ghosts roaming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a249a0b92f34d8555d5aa4d502dfcbd74a07f02a_0.webp)

## **Ghosts come in different kinds, each scary in their own ways:**

**Forlorn Ghost** — charges in and hits hard.

**Spectral Ghost** — fires Shadow Balls.

**Flickering Ghost** — neutral… until provoked.

**Volatile Ghost** — closes in quietly and takes you down with it.

**Wailing Ghost** — merciless with its long-range rain of fire blasts.

**Pyrous Ghost** — shoots a relentless barrage of flames.

**Galeful Ghost** — launches powerful gales at you.

![Ghosts in the nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef0d416911ee29da7f1c773ad614a58217d9c145_0.webp)


**_Passing through walls,_** Ghosts can be a menace to deal with. However, they are afraid of sunlight and will actively hide from the sun. They even have _**different personalities**_, some will fight back to the (second) death, some will flee when they feel like their end is near, and some will teleport and try to disorient you in combat. There are even rumors of villagers getting possessed, causing them to act strangely and turn hostile...


## Repel Ghosts from your base of safety with Cleanse Tags! Place a Cleanse Tag on a block and it will deter any lingering spirits from that point of placement.


![Cleanse tag on house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b72432ae4e695438e24a1df8502eeb2e86ae5b4_0.webp)



## **Some say that Ghosts are just misunderstood wandering souls. Reveal their true forms by crafting and using a Silph Scope on them. You will be able to finally battle or catch the real face behind the specter!**



![Silph scope recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec295b086196ff5a9cd3e8dc6b9bb6092278c34a.png)


## **Pay your respects to the earthbound spirits, or put them to their final rest...**

Join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/sjyv8HcdP2) for news, discussions, and support for Haunted Encounters and my other creations!

### **CREDITS**
All assets made by **Dogtor Bloo**. Huge thanks to **NecroSo1** for being the awesome developer of this mod, and to **Soul from Zinc Studios** for the SFX.

### **IMPORTANT**
- This mod requires Cobblemon and Geckolib as dependencies to run optimally.
- Pokemon that spawn from scoping a Ghost can be altered and adjusted through datapacks.

**ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.**
